title: 笑话 #1
content: I just read a book about Stockholm syndrome. It was pretty bad at first, but by the end I liked it.

title: 笑话 #2
content: What do you call a sheep with no legs? A cloud.

title: 笑话 #3
content: Why did the tomato blush? Because it saw the salad dressing.

title: 笑话 #4
content: What do bees do after they are married? They go on a honeymoon.

title: 笑话 #5
content: I once lost a banana at court but then I appealed.

title: 笑话 #6
content: What do you give a sick lemon? Lemonaid.

title: 笑话 #7
content: I really want to buy one of those supermarket checkout dividers, but the cashier keeps putting it back.

title: 笑话 #8
content:
Why did the cookie cry?
Because his mother was a wafer so long

title: 笑话 #9
content: It was so cold yesterday my computer froze. My own fault though, I left too many windows open.

title: 笑话 #10
content: Have you heard of the band 1023MB? They haven't got a gig yet.

title: 笑话 #11
content: Me and my mates are in a band called Duvet. We're a cover band.

title: 笑话 #12
content: I was wondering why the frisbee was getting bigger, then it hit me.

title: 笑话 #13
content: When is a door not a door? When it's ajar.

title: 笑话 #14
content: What do you get if you cross a turkey with a ghost? A poultry-geist!

title: 笑话 #15
content: I accidentally drank a bottle of invisible ink. Now I’m in hospital, waiting to be seen.

title: 笑话 #16
content: What do you call a fat psychic? A four-chin teller.

title: 笑话 #17
content: What do you call an eagle who can play the piano? Talonted!

title: 笑话 #18
content: I tried to milk a cow today, but was unsuccessful. Udder failure.

title: 笑话 #19
content: When do doctors get angry? When they run out of patients.

title: 笑话 #20
content: Just read a few facts about frogs. They were ribbiting.
